# Claude Code for web example

<!-- source: new content — Claude Code isn't demoed anywhere in v1, only name-checked once.
     Needs a real hands-on worked example run by the author before writing. -->

A worked example using Claude Code's cloud/web interface on the benthic/fish project.

::: {.callout-important title="Challenge" appearance="simple"}
TODO: challenge trying the same task locally vs via Claude Code for web and comparing.
:::
